arts.ttl: Steph Curry and Kendall Jenner join David Beckham at Inter Miami game in LA after soccer icon's 50th birthday bash
arts.sum: Beckham's team suffered defeat on the night at BMO Stadium, with Nathan Ordaz's second-half strike earning LAFC a narrow 1-0 cup victory over Miami front of an A-list crowd.

arts.ttl: Tom Brady's deal with David Beckham to remain controversial for fans
arts.sum: Besides Brady, attendees included basketball legend Shaquille O'Neal and soccer stars Lionel Messi, Jordi Alba, Sergio Busquets, and Luis Suarez - all of whom currently play for Inter Miami . In another Instagram Story, Brady shared a moment captured alongside both Beckham and O'Neal.

arts.ttl: Andre Onana Manchester United future: Former Premier League goalkeeper Michel Vorm on if Ruben Amorim should stick by shot-stopper
arts.sum: Former Premier League goalkeeper Michel Vorm talks to Sports Mole about Andre Onana's struggles and if he should have another chance at Manchester United

arts.ttl: “It’s amazing at Anfield” – David Moyes unimpressed after Everton defeat, even when admitting to Tarkowski fortune
arts.sum: Everton manager David Moyes has openly questioned the refereeing performance in the Merseyside derby defeat to Liverpool, suggesting Anfield may have affected their decisions. Moyes was speaking to Viaplay after the game, which was settled by Diogo Jota’s superb solo strike midway through the second half. arts.ttl: Everton boss David Moyes torn into by football fans for his 'embarrassing' comments in TV interview after James Tarkowski's horror tackle at Liverpool
arts.sum: The Everton defender was lucky to avoid a red card for the reckless tackle on Liverpool's Argentinian midfielder, which drew criticisms from Sky Sports' pundits.

arts.ttl: David Moyes: James Tarkowski lucky not to see red for Alexis Mac Allister tackle
arts.sum: Former Everton striker Duncan Ferguson branded the tackle a ‘straight red all day’.
